questionHtml: Using the gene activation data, deduce, giving two reasons, whether the armyworm or the herbivorous mite has infested lima bean plants over a longer period of time.
markschemeHtml:
a. the greater «gene expression» response of the lima bean plant to the mite infestation indicates a longer evolutionary relationship ✔ OWTTE.

b. herbivorous mites cause more genes to be expressed/higher intensity of gene activation ✔

c. herbivorous mites cause a more immediate/earlier response in gene activation ✔

meta.title: Using the gene activation data, deduce, giving two reasons, whether the armyworm or the herbivorous mite has infested lima bean plants over a longer period of time.
